note: Sample Modern archetypes. Edit freely to reflect the current metagame.

archetypes.name: Izzet Murktide
archetypes.strategy: Tempo: cheap interaction and cantrips fuel a huge Murktide Regent.

archetypes.name: Amulet Titan
archetypes.strategy: Combo-ramp: Amulet of Vigor and bounce lands power out Primeval Titan.

archetypes.name: Living End
archetypes.strategy: Cycle creatures into the graveyard, then cascade into Living End.

archetypes.name: Rakdos Scam
archetypes.strategy: Midrange tempo using evoke elementals reanimated for free, plus removal.

archetypes.name: Hammer Time
archetypes.strategy: Aggro: cheaply equip Colossus Hammer onto an evasive creature.
